Part of the Market module, the Market Linkage framework captures where an entrepreneur sells today (Existing channels with revenue), the new channels recommended as an intervention (each holding its own nested product-mapping table with an implementation status), and a month-by-month Sales Tracker of actual recorded sales. A Summary tab rolls everything up into a channel-wise overview, aggregate cards and intervention-flag tiles.
Channel-status aggregate rule: Each recommended channel carries a single status chip whose value is computed from the implementation status of its nested product rows — Completed only when every product row is Completed; Not Feasible if any row is Not Feasible; In Progress if any row is In Progress; otherwise Pending (also the value when a channel has no product rows yet). Type and Selling Mode are set once at the channel level and apply to all products inside it.

On-Screen UI Structure

Top bar: forest-teal header "Market Linkage" with a "PRIME Rural · Marketing Framework" crumb, and an entrepreneur chip below it (avatar + name auto-fetched from profile).
Tab rail (uppercase pills): Summary · Existing · Required · Sales Tracker · Resources · Task Log. Active tab is teal-filled; opening Summary triggers a roll-up refresh.
Body: The Existing tab is a flat channel grid plus an "Intervention Need" toggle block; the Required tab is a channel repeater where each "+ Add Recommended Channel" creates a collapsible channel card with a nested product table; the Sales Tracker is a set of twelve collapsible month accordions, each holding a CRM-style inner table of one row per SKU-per-channel.
Special widgets: (1) collapsible channel cards (sea-coloured header) carrying channel-level Name / Type / Mode / Location / Identified-By plus an aggregate status chip; (2) nested product tables inside each channel with a per-row Implementation Status select; (3) a toggle switch for "Upgrade / Add New Channels?" that reveals a Justification box; (4) source tags (Existing / Recommended / Self-initiated); (5) twelve month accordions each with a header showing the month's auto Qty + Revenue totals; (6) a Summary tab with a channel-wise overview table, four aggregate cards and four intervention-flag tiles.
Calculated fields (Avg Revenue/Month, Annual Revenue, Annual Total Revenue, per-row Tracker Revenue, all month totals, the channel status chip, and every Summary aggregate) render italic on cream-deep background, read-only, with a tooltip per Rule 1.
Summary
Auto roll-up
→
Existing
Current channels + revenue
→
Required
Recommended channels + nested products
→
Sales Tracker
Monthly actual sales
→
Resources
Reference materials
→
Task Log
Activity register

User Journey

1. Map Existing Channels
Name / Type / Mode / Location, price & units
→
2. Flag Upgrade Need
Toggle on → justify → go to Required
→
3. Add Recommended Channels
Channel card + nested product table
→
4. Set Product Status
Per-row status drives channel chip
→
5. Record Monthly Sales
Add rows per month; revenue auto-calcs
→
6. Review Summary
Overview + aggregates + flags
Tab 1 — Existing (Current Selling Channels + Intervention Need)

Maps where the entrepreneur is currently selling — all offline, online and exhibition channels — in a flat repeater grid (caption: "Map where the entrepreneur is currently selling"). "+ Add Channel" appends a row; the three revenue columns auto-calculate. Below the grid sits the Intervention Need block.

Current Selling Channels (child table)

Field NameField TypeInput ValuesInputAutofillLogicValidation & Error Messages
#Auto number01, 02, …CalculatedRow index (zero-padded)Renumbers on add/delete.Non-editable.
Channel NameDataFree text, e.g., "Mawkynrew Weekly Market", "Shillong Grocery Store", "WhatsApp Direct Orders"Manual—Rows with a blank name are skipped in the Summary roll-up.Required for the row to count. Error: "Enter the channel name."
TypeSelectOnline; OfflineManual—Drives the Existing Online / Offline split in the Summary.Optional.
Selling ModeSelectB2B; B2C; D2C; ExhibitionManual—Counted into the Summary B2B / B2C / D2C / Exhibition tallies (existing + recommended).Optional.
LocationSelectBlock Master: Mawkynrew, Mawphlang, Pynursla, Mylliem, Sohra (Cherrapunji), Mawsynram, Khliehriat, Jowai, Resubelpara, Tura, Williamnagar, Baghmara, OtherManual——Optional.
Price (₹)Float (step 0.01)Numeric per unitManual—Drives Avg Revenue/Month (= Price × units). Recalculates live on input.Optional; numeric ≥ 0. Error on negative: "Price cannot be negative."
Avg Revenue / Month (₹)Number / units (input)Numeric average units sold per monthManual—Despite the label this cell takes the average monthly units; multiplied by Price to derive the calculated revenue figures.Optional; numeric ≥ 0.
Annual Revenue (₹)Currency (read-only)AutoCalculated= (Price × units) × 12Italic on cream-deep, tooltip (Rule 1). The Summary Best Channel and Total Annual Revenue read from here.Non-editable.
Annual Total Revenue (₹)Currency (read-only)AutoCalculated= Price × units × 12Italic on cream-deep, tooltip (Rule 1); the annualised total for the channel.Non-editable.
Caption under the grid: "Avg Revenue/Month, Annual Revenue and Annual Total Revenue auto-calculate." Existing channels surface in the Summary overview with a blue Existing source tag and an "Active" status chip.

Intervention Need block

Field NameField TypeInput ValuesInputAutofillLogicValidation & Error Messages
Upgrade / Add New Channels?Toggle (On / Off)Off (default) / OnManual—Conditional: Off shows the note "Not flagged"; On switches the note to "Flagged — add recommended channels in Required tab" and reveals the Justification box. Sets the Summary "Upgrade Needed" flag to Yes/No.Optional.
JustificationSmall Text (conditional)Reason for upgrading or adding new channelsManual—Shown only when the toggle is On.Optional; only relevant when shown.
Tab 2 — Required (Recommended Channels → nested product tables)

Channel repeater (heading "I. Recommended Channels"). "+ Add Recommended Channel" creates a collapsible channel card that holds its own product-mapping table; a new card seeds one product row automatically. Note shown: "Each channel holds its own product mapping table. Type and Selling Mode are set at the channel level and apply to all products within it."

Channel Card Header

Field NameField TypeInput ValuesInputAutofillLogicValidation & Error Messages
Channel NameDataFree text, e.g., "Amazon India", "Shillong Mela 2025"Manual—Cards with a blank name are skipped in the Summary roll-up.Required before save. Error: "Enter the channel name."
TypeSelectOnline; OfflineManual—Channel-level; applies to all products in the card.Optional.
Selling ModeSelectB2B; B2C; D2C; ExhibitionManual—Channel-level; counted into the Summary mode tallies.Optional.
LocationSelectBlock Master (Mawkynrew … Baghmara, Other)Manual——Optional.
Identified BySelectGround Team; Core Team; EntrepreneurManual—Records who recommended the channel.Optional.
Status ChipChip (read-only, aggregate)Pending / In Progress / Completed / Not FeasibleCalculatedDerived from the Implementation Status of every product row in this cardItalic-equivalent read-only aggregate (Rule 1). Completed only when all product rows are Completed; Not Feasible if any row is Not Feasible; In Progress if any row is In Progress; else Pending (also when no product rows exist). Recomputes on status change, row add and row delete.Non-editable.
Remove (channel)Action button—Manual—Deletes the channel and all its product rows.Confirm prompt: "Remove this channel and all its products?"

Products Sold via this Channel (nested child table per channel)

"+ Add Product" appends a row; "x" deletes it. Each row's status feeds the channel aggregate chip above.

Field NameField TypeInput ValuesInputAutofillLogicValidation & Error Messages
#Auto number01, 02, …CalculatedRow index (zero-padded)Renumbers on add/delete.Non-editable.
Product NameSelect (Link)Distinct Product Master names: Bamboo Shoot Pickle, Lemongrass Tea, Lakadong Turmeric, Eri Silk MufflerManual—Cascading: on change, filters the SKU dropdown to that product's SKUs. Counts toward "Products Mapped" / "Unique Products" in the Summary.Optional per row.
Product SKUSelect (cascading)SKUs for the chosen product, e.g., BST-PCK-200-G — 200g Standard; BST-PCK-500-G — 500g Family; LMG-TEA-50-G — 50g Pouch; LMG-TEA-100-G — 100g Tin; LKD-TUR-100-G — 100g Pouch; LKD-TUR-250-G — 250g Jar; ERI-MUF-001 — 180x30 cmManual—Shows "Select Product first" until a Product Name is chosen.Optional.
Price (₹)Float (step 0.01)Numeric per unitManual—Reference / target price for this SKU via this channel.Optional; numeric ≥ 0.
NotesDataFree textManual——Optional.
Implementation StatusSelectPending; In Progress; Completed; Not FeasibleManual—Drives the channel aggregate chip (see Channel Card Header) and the Summary Intervention-Status counters.Optional; defaults to Pending.
Aggregate logic restated: the channel chip is Completed only when every product row reads Completed. A single Not Feasible row makes the channel Not Feasible; any In Progress row (with none Not Feasible) makes it In Progress; otherwise it stays Pending.
Tab 3 — Sales Tracker (monthly accordions, actual recorded sales)

Twelve collapsible month accordions (January … December). Each accordion header shows that month's auto Qty and Revenue totals; the section header shows grand Total Units and Annual Revenue chips. Caption: "Each month is a collapsible section. Each row = one SKU via one channel. Price can differ per month. Revenue auto-calculates." "+ Add Row" appends a row inside the open month.

Cohort-year span (Rule 11): the tracker is read against the entrepreneur's cohort / fellowship year — the twelve month buckets belong to the active cohort year, and historical buckets remain visible across the cohort span rather than resetting on calendar year-end. Tracker totals represent actual recorded sales and are kept distinct from the Existing-tab projected revenue in the Summary.

Per-Month Sales Row (inner table; one per SKU-per-channel)

Field NameField TypeInput ValuesInputAutofillLogicValidation & Error Messages
#Auto number01, 02, …CalculatedRow index within the month (zero-padded)Renumbers on add/delete within that month.Non-editable.
SourceSelectExisting; Recommended; Self-initiatedManual—On select, renders a coloured source tag under the cell (Existing = blue, Recommended = green, Self-initiated = terracotta).Optional.
Channel NameDataFree text, e.g., "Mawkynrew Weekly Market"Manual—Identifies which channel the sale went through.Optional.
TypeSelectOnline; OfflineManual——Optional.
Selling ModeSelectB2B; B2C; D2C; ExhibitionManual——Optional.
ProductSelect (Link)Distinct Product Master names (Bamboo Shoot Pickle, Lemongrass Tea, Lakadong Turmeric, Eri Silk Muffler)Manual—Cascading: filters the SKU dropdown to that product.Optional.
SKUSelect (cascading)SKUs for the chosen product (BST-PCK-200-G … ERI-MUF-001)Manual—Shows "Select Product first" until a Product is chosen.Optional.
QuantityNumber (min 0)Units sold this monthManual—Drives row Revenue (= Quantity × Price) and month Qty total.Optional; numeric ≥ 0.
Price (₹)Float (step 0.01)Numeric per unit; may differ per monthManual—Drives row Revenue.Optional; numeric ≥ 0.
RevenueCurrency (read-only)"—" when zero, else "Rs <amount>"Calculated= Quantity × PriceItalic-equivalent read-only (Rule 1); recalculates live and rolls into the month Qty/Revenue totals and the grand Annual Revenue.Non-editable.

Month & Grand Totals (read-only)

MetricField TypeSourceInputAutofillLogicValidation & Error Messages
Month QtyRead-onlyMonth rowsCalculatedSum of row Quantity for that month"—" when the month has no rows; shown in the accordion header.Non-editable.
Month RevenueRead-only currencyMonth rowsCalculatedSum of row Revenue for that month"—" when empty; shown in the accordion header.Non-editable.
Total Units (grand)Read-onlyAll monthsCalculatedSum of all month Qty totalsShown in the section header chip; "0" when no data.Non-editable.
Annual Revenue (grand)Read-only currencyAll monthsCalculatedSum of all month Revenue totalsShown in the section header chip ("Rs 0.00" when no data); also surfaces as the Summary "Tracker Annual Revenue".Non-editable.
Tab 4 — Summary (auto roll-up, read-only)

Entirely calculated — no manual entry; refreshes on open. Comprises (1) a Channel-wise Overview table (existing + recommended), (2) four Aggregate cards (Existing / Revenue / Interventions / Intervention Status), (3) four Intervention-flag tiles.

Channel-wise Overview (one row per channel; existing then recommended)

Caption: "Existing channels with revenue. Recommended channels show alongside with their implementation status." Recommended rows are highlighted; a TOTAL row sums annual revenue when existing channels exist.

ColumnField TypeSourceInputAutofillLogicValidation & Error Messages
ChannelRead-onlyExisting grid / Required cardCalculatedChannel name (bold)Row keyed to the channel.—
TypeRead-only pillChannelCalculatedOnline (blue) / Offline (amber) pill"—" if blank.—
ModeRead-onlyChannelCalculatedSelling Mode——
LocationRead-onlyChannelCalculatedBlock——
Avg Rev / Month (₹)Read-only currencyExisting gridCalculatedAvg monthly revenue (teal)"—" for recommended channels (no revenue captured).—
Annual Revenue (₹)Read-only currencyExisting gridCalculatedAnnual revenue (green)"—" for recommended channels.—
SourceRead-only tagSystemCalculatedExisting (blue) or Recommended (green) source tag——
Intervention StatusRead-only chipChannelCalculated"Active" for existing; aggregate status chip for recommendedRecommended uses the channel aggregate (Completed / In Progress / Pending / Not Feasible).—

Aggregate Cards & Intervention Flags (all read-only counters)

MetricField TypeGroupInputAutofillLogicValidation & Error Messages
Total ChannelsRead-only countExistingCalculatedCount of existing channels with a name——
OnlineRead-only countExistingCalculatedExisting channels with Type = Online——
OfflineRead-only countExistingCalculatedExisting channels with Type = Offline——
Upgrade NeededRead-only flagExistingCalculatedYes / No from the Intervention-Need toggleAmber when Yes; also a flag tile.—
Total Annual Revenue (₹)Read-only currencyRevenueCalculatedSum of existing Annual Revenue (green)"—" if no existing channels.—
Avg Revenue / Month (₹)Read-only currencyRevenueCalculated= Total Annual Revenue ÷ 12——
Best ChannelRead-onlyRevenueCalculatedExisting channel with the highest annual revenueTruncated with ellipsis.—
Tracker Annual Revenue (₹)Read-only currencyRevenueCalculatedSum of Sales-Tracker month revenues (green)Caption: "Tracker = actual recorded sales." Kept distinct from projected revenue.—
Recommended Channels AddedRead-only countInterventionsCalculatedCount of named recommended channelsAlso a flag tile.—
Products MappedRead-only countInterventionsCalculatedTotal product rows (with a product) across recommended channels——
Unique ProductsRead-only countInterventionsCalculatedDistinct product names mapped——
B2B / B2C / D2C / ExhibitionRead-only countsInterventionsCalculatedSelling-Mode tallies across existing + recommended channelsFour separate counters.—
Status — CompletedRead-only countIntervention StatusCalculatedProduct rows with status Completed (green)Counted across all recommended product rows.—
Status — In ProgressRead-only countIntervention StatusCalculatedProduct rows In Progress (amber)——
Status — PendingRead-only countIntervention StatusCalculatedProduct rows Pending (or unset)——
Status — Not FeasibleRead-only countIntervention StatusCalculatedProduct rows Not Feasible (red)——
Flag — Annual Revenue / Channels Active / Upgrade Needed / Recommended ChannelsRead-only flag tilesFlagsCalculatedAnnual revenue (₹); count of active existing channels; Yes/No upgrade; recommended channel countFour tiles mirroring the cards above.—
Tab 5 — Resources (Reference Materials child table)

Single child table; at least one row required.

Field NameField TypeInput ValuesInputAutofillLogicValidation & Error Messages
Resource TitleDataFree textManual——Required if row kept. Error: "Enter a resource title."
CategorySelectBuyer / Retailer Contact; Wholesale Market Directory; E-commerce Platform Guide; Exhibition / Mela Calendar; Govt Scheme / Subsidy; Packaging & Branding Reference; Pricing Benchmarks; SHG / FPO Linkage; OtherManual——Optional.
TypeSelectContact; Reference; Quotation; Agreement / MOU; Map / Location; Photo / EvidenceManual——Optional.
Description / NotesDataFree text notesManual——Optional.
FileAttach (Upload / View)File uploadManual—Upload and View actions.Optional.
Delete is blocked when only one row remains. Error: "At least one row is required."
Tab 6 — Task Log (Market Linkage Activities register)

Activity register with a live entry counter. Each entry below.

Field NameField TypeInput ValuesInputAutofillLogicValidation & Error Messages
No.Auto number01, 02, …CalculatedSequential, zero-paddedRenumbers on delete; drives the entry counter.Non-editable.
DateDateDate pickerManual——Optional.
Task NameSelectML task list: 01 Map Existing Selling Channels; 02 Record Channel Revenue Data; 03 Identify Channel Upgrade / Expansion Need; 04 Research New Market Channels; 05 Identify Potential Buyers / Retailers; 06 Contact Potential Buyer / Retailer; 07 Conduct Buyer Meeting; 08 Negotiate Terms / Pricing; 09 Finalise Channel Agreement / MOU; 10 Set Up Online Channel (e-commerce / social); 11 Register for Exhibition / Mela; 12 Prepare Products for New Channel; 13 First Dispatch / Delivery to New Channel; 14 Monitor Channel Sales Performance; 15 Review Pricing Strategy by Channel; 16 Update Sales Tracker; "If other, specify in comments"Manual——Required per entry. Error: "Select a task."
Notes / OutcomeDataFree textManual——Optional.
AttachmentAttach (Upload)File uploadManual——Optional.
Key validations (whole form): (1) A channel row/card counts only when Channel Name is filled — "Enter the channel name." (2) The recommended channel status chip is system-calculated and read-only: Completed only when all nested product rows are Completed, Not Feasible if any row is Not Feasible, In Progress if any row is In Progress, else Pending — it must never be hand-edited. (3) All numeric fields (Price, Avg Revenue/Month units, Quantity) must be ≥ 0; negatives rejected ("Price cannot be negative"). (4) Existing revenue columns (Avg Revenue/Month, Annual Revenue, Annual Total Revenue) and every Tracker Revenue / month total / grand total are auto-calculated and non-editable. (5) Justification is only valid / shown when the "Upgrade / Add New Channels?" toggle is On. (6) Product SKU is enabled only after a Product Name is chosen (cascading). (7) Tracker month buckets belong to the active cohort year (Rule 11) and Tracker revenue (actual) is kept distinct from projected Existing-channel revenue. (8) Removing a channel deletes all its products (confirm prompt). (9) Resources table must retain at least one row. (10) Task Log entries require a Task Name. (11) All Indian currency uses ₹ with Indian number formatting (e.g., ₹ 1,00,000).
Section Review:
PR-MKT-004

Promotions

Part of the Market module, the Promotions framework maps how an entrepreneur currently promotes their products across all offline and online (digital) channels, flags whether new promotion methods are needed, proposes recommended channels with an implementation status, and tracks promotional / digital-marketing activities through a task log and resource library. Backed by DF Promotional Marketing (one record per entrepreneur) with Promotional Marketing Entry child rows phased Existing / Required.

On-Screen UI Structure

Top bar: forest-teal header "Promotions" with a "PRIME Rural · Marketing Framework" crumb, and an entrepreneur chip below it (avatar + name auto-fetched from the Entrepreneur Profile).
Tab rail (uppercase pills): Summary · Existing · Required · Resources · Task Log. Active tab is teal-filled; the form opens on the Summary tab (which refreshes on open).
Body: the Existing and Required tabs are channel repeaters ("+ Add Promotion" appends a row) backed by the same Promotional Marketing Entry child table, differentiated by a Phase field (Existing vs Required). The Existing tab additionally carries an Intervention Need block (toggle + justification). The Required tab adds an Implementation Status column. Resources and Task Log are independent child-table registers.
Special widgets: (1) an Intervention Need toggle (forest-green when on) that reveals a justification textarea and flags the record for new promotion methods; (2) a conditional Digital Platform Category column that becomes relevant only when Channel Type = Online (NA when Offline); (3) an Implementation Status pill (Pending / In Progress / Completed / Not Feasible) on Required rows; (4) a Summary tab with a Promotion-wise Overview table, four Aggregate cards (Existing / Cost-Frequency / Interventions / Intervention Status) and four Intervention-flag tiles; (5) Upload / View file actions on Resources and Task Log rows.
Calculated fields (entrepreneur chip, all Summary overview rows, aggregate counters and flag tiles, the live Task Log entry counter) render italic on cream-deep background, read-only, with a tooltip per Rule 1.
Summary
Auto roll-up
→
Existing
Current channels + Intervention flag
→
Required
Recommended channels + status
→
Resources
Reference materials
→
Task Log
Activity register

User Journey

1. Open Profile
Entrepreneur, District, Block auto-fetched
→
2. Map Existing
Add current offline / online promotions
→
3. Flag Need
Toggle "Need new methods?" + justify
→
4. Recommend
Propose channels; set Implementation Status
→
5. Resources
Attach guides, templates, evidence
→
6. Log & Review
Record tasks; Summary rolls up
Tab 1 — Existing (current promotion channels + Intervention Need)

Caption: "Map how the entrepreneur currently promotes their products — all offline and online activities." A channel repeater ("+ Add Promotion") writes Promotional Marketing Entry rows with Phase = Existing. Below the table sits the Intervention Need block. Two demo rows are seeded (Facebook Page Posts, WhatsApp Status Updates).

Header — Auto-fetched context (read-only)

Field NameField TypeInput ValuesInputAutofillLogicValidation & Error Messages
EntrepreneurLink (Enterprenur Profile)Entrepreneur Profile masterManual (set on create)Drives the chip & all fetchesUnique — one DF Promotional Marketing record per entrepreneur. Autoname PRM-.{enterprenur_name}.-.#####.Required. Duplicate entrepreneur rejected (unique).
ModuleSelect (read-only)Accounts / Manufacturing / Product Development / MarketingCalculatedDefault "Marketing"Fixed for this framework.Non-editable.
Applicable ToSelect (read-only)Product / EnterpreneurCalculatedDefault "Product"Fixed for this framework.Non-editable.
DistrictLink (read-only, hidden)District MasterCalculatedFetched from Entrepreneur → districtItalic on cream-deep, tooltip (Rule 1).Non-editable.
BlockLink (read-only, hidden)Block MasterCalculatedFetched from Entrepreneur → blockItalic on cream-deep, tooltip (Rule 1).Non-editable.

Existing Promotions (Promotional Marketing Entry, Phase = Existing)

Repeater grid. Mockup columns: Promotion Name / Type / Handled by / Frequency / Notes. Backed by the richer child doctype below (Channel Type, Promotion Mode, Digital Platform Category, Platform Name, Handled By, Contact, Details / Impact, Tools Used).

Field NameField TypeInput ValuesInputAutofillLogicValidation & Error Messages
#Auto number01, 02, …CalculatedRow index (zero-padded)Renumbers on add / delete.Non-editable.
PhaseSelect (read-only here)Existing / RequiredCalculatedSet to "Existing" for all rows on this tabRequired by the child doctype; segregates this tab's rows from the Required tab.Required (system-set).
Promotion NameDatae.g., "Facebook Page Posts", "WhatsApp Status Updates"Manual—Stored as Platform Name on the child row; primary label in Summary & overview.Required for the row to count in Summary. Error: "Enter the promotion name."
Type (Channel Type)SelectOffline; OnlineManual—Drives the Online / Offline aggregate split. When Online, Digital Platform Category becomes relevant; when Offline it may be NA.Optional; recommended. Counts toward Online / Offline tallies.
Promotion ModeSelectRetail; Exhibitions; Hospitality; Direct; Festivals; Shops; Pop-ups; Social Media; Videos; Ads; OtherManual—Categorises the promotion activity.Optional.
Digital Platform CategorySelect (conditional)NA; WhatsApp; YouTube; Facebook; Instagram; OtherManual—Conditional: relevant when Channel Type = Online; "Can be NA if Channel Type is Offline."Optional; set to NA for offline channels.
Handled bySelect / DataSelf; Family; Paid 3rd Party (mockup free-text e.g., "Self / Daughter")Manual—Who runs the channel.Optional.
ContactSmall TextManager / agency contact infoManual—Relevant mainly when Handled by = Paid 3rd Party.Optional.
FrequencySelectDaily; Weekly; Monthly; YearlyManual—Drives the Cost / Frequency aggregate counts (Daily / Weekly / Monthly / Yearly).Optional.
Notes (Details / Impact)Small Texte.g., "Product photos, occasional videos"; reach, spend, engagement, generated salesManual—Free observation field; "Generated sales or engagement accomplished from the channel."Optional.
Tools UsedSelectBusiness Card; Brochure; Catalogue; Photos; VideosManual—Collateral used on the channel.Optional.
DeleteAction (×)—Manual—Removes the row and renumbers.—

Intervention Need block (terracotta panel)

Field NameField TypeInput ValuesInputAutofillLogicValidation & Error Messages
Need New Promotion Methods?Toggle (Check)Off / OnManual—When On: note flips to "↻ Flagged → Add new promotion methods in Required tab", reveals the Justification field, and sets the "New Methods Needed" Summary flag to Yes. When Off: note reads "Not flagged" and the Justification is hidden.Optional.
JustificationSmall Text (conditional)Reason for needing new promotion methodsManual—Shown only when the toggle is On.Recommended when the toggle is On.
A row counts in Summary only once its Promotion Name is filled. Channel Type drives the Online / Offline split; Frequency drives the Daily / Weekly / Monthly / Yearly cost counts. Turning on the Intervention toggle is the trigger to populate the Required tab.
Tab 2 — Required (recommended promotion channels + Implementation Status)

Caption: "Propose promotion strategies to add or upgrade based on identified gaps." Same repeater, writing Promotional Marketing Entry rows with Phase = Required, plus a Suggested Handled by column and an Implementation Status column. Rows appear highlighted ("+ New") in the Summary overview. A demo row is seeded (Instagram Reels, In Progress).

Field NameField TypeInput ValuesInputAutofillLogicValidation & Error Messages
#Auto number01, 02, …CalculatedRow index (zero-padded)Renumbers on add / delete.Non-editable.
PhaseSelect (read-only here)Existing / RequiredCalculatedSet to "Required" for all rows on this tabRequired by the child doctype; segregates these rows from the Existing tab.Required (system-set).
Promotion NameDatae.g., "Instagram Reels"Manual—Stored as Platform Name; primary label in Summary (shown with a "+ New" badge).Required for the row to count. Error: "Enter the promotion name."
Type (Channel Type)SelectOffline; OnlineManual—Drives Online / Offline additions in the Interventions aggregate card.Optional; recommended.
Promotion ModeSelectRetail; Exhibitions; Hospitality; Direct; Festivals; Shops; Pop-ups; Social Media; Videos; Ads; OtherManual—Categorises the proposed activity.Optional.
Digital Platform CategorySelect (conditional)NA; WhatsApp; YouTube; Facebook; Instagram; OtherManual—Conditional: relevant when Channel Type = Online; NA for Offline.Optional.
Suggested Handled bySelect / DataSelf; Family; Paid 3rd Party (mockup free-text e.g., "Marketing Intern / Family")Manual—Distinct values surface as "Suggested Handled By" in the Interventions card.Optional.
ContactSmall TextManager / agency contact infoManual—Relevant when a paid third party is suggested.Optional.
FrequencySelectDaily; Weekly; Monthly; YearlyManual—Proposed cadence.Optional.
Notes (Details / Impact)Small Texte.g., "Short videos showing process and product"; tactics, budget, justificationManual—Free field for the proposed tactics.Optional.
Tools UsedSelectBusiness Card; Brochure; Catalogue; Photos; VideosManual—Collateral planned.Optional.
Implementation StatusSelectPending; In Progress; Completed; Not Feasible (child doctype underlying values: Suggested / Implemented)Manual—Colour-coded pill (green / amber / cream / terracotta). Drives the Intervention Status card (Completed / In Progress / Pending / Not Feasible) and recalculates the Summary on change. Mandatory on the child row when Phase = Required.Required when Phase = Required. Error: "Set the implementation status."
DeleteAction (×)—Manual—Removes the row and renumbers.—
Required rows are the "intervention" recommendations — they roll up into "New Methods Recommended", Online / Offline Additions and the Intervention Status counts on the Summary. Blank / unset status is treated as Pending.
Tab 3 — Summary (auto roll-up, read-only)

Entirely calculated — no manual entry; refreshes on open. Comprises (1) a Promotion-wise Overview table, (2) four Aggregate cards, (3) four Intervention-flag tiles. Caption: "One row per existing promotion. Recommended new methods appear highlighted below."
